comments.author: tau-backlog
comments.text: Aligned the /memories summary rows by computing shared widths for the entries/count columns across project/global/user, then right-padding the summaries so the rows render exactly as the user requested. Added a renderer regression test that locks the expected output lines verbatim, including the double-space before the shorter `1452/500 chars` field. Verified with npm run gate in extensions/tau/.
